history.content:
<thought>
I am at (2,B) facing right. I need to move towards the goal at (8,H). A viable path is to go down to row4, then right to column E, then down to row6, then left to column B, then down to row8, then right to column H. First, I need to face down to move south. I will turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row02 column B, facing down. The cell directly in front (row03, column B) is empty floor (`.`), safe to move. My long-term goal is to reach the goal at row08 column H. I will start by moving down.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). To reach the goal at row 08 column H, I need to move right first to eventually reach column E, then go down. Therefore, I should turn counter-clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,B) facing east. The goal is at (8,H). I need to navigate around lava cells. My immediate safe move is east to (3,C) which is floor. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,C) facing east. The goal is at (8,H). I need to navigate through safe cells. I plan to move east to (3,D), then continue east to (3,E), then turn clockwise to face south, then move south to (4,E) and (5,E), then continue south to (6,E), then turn west, move west to (6,D), (6,C), (6,B), then turn south, move south to (7,B) and (8,B), then turn east and move east along row 8 to (8,H). The first step is to move forward to (3,D).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing east (to the right). To reach the goal at row 8, column H, I need to first move left (west) to column B, then go down through safe cells. My current orientation is east; to face west, I need to turn counter-clockwise twice. For this step, I will turn counter-clockwise to face north.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, D) facing up. To reach the goal at (8, H), I plan to first move right to (3, E), then head down through safe cells. My current orientation is up, so I need to turn clockwise to face right in order to move east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3 column D facing right. I need to navigate to the goal at row 8 column H. A good path is to go down first to row 4 column D, then right to column E, then down to row 6 column E, then left to column B, then down to row 8 column B, then right to H. So my next step is to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing down. I need to move towards the goal at row 8, column H. The path involves first moving right to column E, then down to row 5, then left across row 6 to column B, then down to row 8, then right to the goal. To move right, I need to change my orientation from down to right. Turning counter-clockwise will achieve that.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3 column D facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 3 column E) is a floor cell ('.'), so it is safe to move. I want to navigate towards the goal at row 8 column H, so I will move forward to begin my path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column E, facing right. I need to navigate to the goal at row 08, column H. The safest path is to go down to row 6, then left to column B, then down to row 8, then right to the goal. First, I should turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column E, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach it, I need to go down to row 6, then left to column B, then down to row 8, then right to column H. The immediate safe move is to go forward (down) to row 04, column E, which is a floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column E, facing down. The cell directly in front (row 5, col E) is a safe floor cell. To reach the goal, I need to first go down to row 5 and then row 6, then turn left to go around the lava. So I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row05 column E facing down. The cell directly ahead (row06 col E) is floor (safe). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal via the western path around the lava.
</thought>

FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at position row06 colE facing down. The cell directly ahead (row07 colE) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to go left to column B, then down, then right. So I should first turn clockwise to face left.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column E, facing left. The goal is at row 8, column H. A safe path is to move left three cells to reach (6,2), then turn down, move down twice, turn right, and move right six cells to the goal. The immediate next step is to move forward (left) to (6,4), which is a safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
I am at row 6, column D, facing left. The goal is at row 8, column H. To reach it, I need to go left first to avoid lava. My immediate next move is to go forward to the empty cell (6, C). That is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column C, facing left. To navigate towards the goal at row 8, column H, I need to first move left into column B (row 6, col B), which is a safe floor cell. Then I can turn downward to proceed south. Moving forward now is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 column B, facing left. The goal is at row 8 column H. To move towards the goal, I need to first go down. My forward direction (left) is blocked by a wall, so I need to turn. Turning counter-clockwise will make me face down, allowing me to move down to row 7 column B, which is safe. Then I can continue down and then east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<thought>
